title: T-011 — /api/oee/line/[id]/trend Server endpoint + rate-limit + report_access_gate (OEE §10.1, §11 V-OEE-ACCESS)
prompt:
# T-011 — Per-line 24h trend API endpoint

PRD: docs/prd/15-OEE-PRD.md §10.1 (Per-line 24h Trend), §11 V-OEE-ACCESS-1..4, §12.1 (consumer reads)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Server-side data loader for OEE-001 (Per-line 24h Trend dashboard): read oee_snapshots (last 1h/6h/24h window) + downtime_events (top 3 causes) + active changeover_events (markers). Enforces RLS via `withOrgContext` (Wave1 T-125), reuses `report_access_gate_v1` rule (V-OEE-ACCESS-2 referenced from 12-REPORTING), applies Wave1 T-121 rate-limit (60 req/min/user), emits Wave1 T-117 trace span.

## Pre-flight
Read: existing API/Server-Action pattern in `apps/web/app/api/` or analogous modules; Wave1 T-125 `withOrgContext` helper; Wave1 T-121 rate-limit middleware; existing `report_access_gate_v1` rule (12-REPORTING).

## Implementation contract
1. Server-side loader `apps/web/app/(oee)/line/[id]/trend/loader.ts` (RSC loader function called from page.tsx in T-014):
   - Accepts: `lineId`, `window: '1h'|'6h'|'24h'`, `shiftFilter?: string` (URL search params).
   - Wraps query in `withOrgContext` (Wave1 T-125) so RLS uses `app.current_org_id()` per V-OEE-ACCESS-3.
   - Runs `report_access_gate_v1` from 12-REPORTING rule registry against (user_role, 'oee.line.trend'); on deny returns 403 (V-OEE-ACCESS-2).
   - Drizzle reads: oee_snapshots ordered by snapshot_minute DESC for the window; downtime_events grouped by category for the window; latest changeover_events for the line.
   - Returns shape `{ snapshots: TrendPoint[], topDowntime: DowntimeCause[], changeovers: ChangeoverMarker[], lastAggregationAt: Date, target: { oee_target_pct: number } }` (target sourced from oee_alert_thresholds per line, falling back to tenant default per §13.1 Apex 70%).
2. Optional Next.js Route Handler `apps/web/app/api/oee/line/[id]/trend/route.ts` for SWR client refresh (per §10.1 setInterval 60s) returning the same shape as JSON; gated by Wave1 T-121 rate-limit (60 req/min/user, sliding window) + 401 if session absent (V-OEE-ACCESS-1).
3. Observability: Wave1 T-117 trace span tagged with route, lineId, window, org_id, snapshot_count, duration_ms; structured log via T-116 on every error path.
4. Vitest: (a) 401 when session absent, (b) 403 when role lacks `oee.dashboard.read` via report_access_gate_v1, (c) RLS isolation across two orgs returns 0 rows for cross-org line_id, (d) rate-limit kicks at 61 req/min returning 429, (e) shape matches contract for happy path, (f) trace span emitted with documented attributes.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(oee)/line/[id]/trend/loader.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/api/oee/line/[id]/trend/route.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/api/oee/line/[id]/trend/__tests__/route.test.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(oee)/line/[id]/trend/__tests__/loader.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given no session, when GET /api/oee/line/LINE_01/trend?window=24h runs, then response is 401 (V-OEE-ACCESS-1).
2. Given a session with role lacking oee.dashboard.read, when the loader is called, then it returns 403 via report_access_gate_v1 (V-OEE-ACCESS-2).
3. Given two orgs each with snapshots for a same-named line, when `withOrgContext(orgA)` invokes the loader, then only orgA snapshots are returned (V-OEE-ACCESS-3 RLS via app.current_org_id()).
4. Given 61 requests in a minute from the same user, when the 61st arrives, then the response is 429 (Wave1 T-121 rate-limit) and a structured log is emitted.

## Test strategy
- RED: vitest oee/line-trend-route + loader asserting four ACs.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run app/api/oee/line && pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run app/(oee)/line`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not compute OEE synchronously in this endpoint — read from oee_snapshots / MVs only (D-OEE-1).
- Do not use `current_setting()` for tenant scope — use `withOrgContext`/`app.current_org_id()` (Wave1 T-125).
- Do not skip Wave1 T-121 rate-limit — abuse vector on a polling endpoint.
- Do not skip Wave1 T-117 trace span — observability required on every compute path.
- Do not bypass report_access_gate_v1 — V-OEE-ACCESS-2 reuses the 12-REPORTING rule.

pipeline_inputs.description: Per-line 24h trend Server loader + JSON Route Handler with withOrgContext/RLS, report_access_gate_v1, Wave1 rate-limit + observability.
pipeline_inputs.details: Drives OEE-001 (T-014). 60s SWR client refresh per §10.1. report_access_gate_v1 reuse closes V-OEE-ACCESS-2 (no parallel access logic in 15-OEE). target sourced from oee_alert_thresholds per-line override, falling back to tenant default 70% per §13.1 Apex baseline.
